Plaintiff San Francisco Housing Authority is present. Represented by Candice Wilton. Attorney Tony Ruch appearing for Plaintiff.
Defendant Chilsie Williams IS NOT present.

The settlement conference is taken off calendar because there was no appearance by defendant.
The trial date of NOV-21-2011 remains on calendar.
